Text.Page: I've added up the facts and subtracted the rumors, and I've come to the conclusion that this all began with Sidurek. After he appeared, the Lokians weren't far behind.<NEXTPAGEBUTTON>"And where can I find him?"</NEXTPAGEBUTTON>
He'a usually somewhere near the Free Brotherhood stronghold. He may not be alone, so be careful.

A letter? Let's see it. It's to someone named Malachai.

I'll look into this. Thank you for helping.
The longer Sidurek lives the worse the problem will become.
